Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Melbourne Bch

These 3 Melbourne Bch restaurants pass Florida health inspections with an A grade and earn strong diner ratings — a clean kitchen and a meal people love. Sorted by rating.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • S A 93
    SUNNYSIDE CAFE

    American 4.7★ (1302)

    Melbourne Beach · Brevard County

    VegHealthy

  • C A 94
    CAFE COCONUT COVE

    Other 4.7★ (995)

    Melbourne Bch · Brevard County

    KetoPaleo

  • S A 97
    STEAK & LOBSTER HOUSE

    Steak 4.4★ (1542)

    Melbourne Bch · Brevard County
